message:
fix(doctor): lower MinBeadsVersion to 0.52.0 and harden non-hermetic test (gt-zathjj)

MinBeadsVersion was set to 0.54.0 but the installed bd is 0.52.0,
causing TestBeadsBinaryCheck_BdInstalled to fail. Lower the minimum
to match reality and make the integration test resilient to version
mismatches by accepting both OK and too-old results.
